profile.name: Virupaksha Jathan
profile.title: Director, Software Engineering
profile.bio: Engineering leader driving Java platform modernization, AI-powered optimization, and enterprise-scale DevOps transformation at Walmart. Passionate about building high-performing teams and delivering innovation that impacts millions of customers.
profile.tagline: Platform Engineering Leader | Java Modernization | AI/ML Innovation

corporateImpact.title: Enterprise-Wide Java Modernization
corporateImpact.metric: Migrated 2,000+ applications from JDK 8/11 to JDK 21
corporateImpact.impact: $8M+ annual cost savings through vendor licensing optimization and 30% performance improvement
corporateImpact.scope: Led policy enforcement affecting 100% of Walmart's Java applications across global operations
corporateImpact.leadership: Directed cross-functional team of 15+ engineers, coordinated with 50+ application teams

corporateImpact.title: AI-Powered JVM Optimization Platform (jOptimizer)
corporateImpact.metric: Automated JVM tuning reducing manual configuration time by 85%
corporateImpact.impact: 15-50% CPU reduction and 2-2.5x throughput improvement across 100+ production applications
corporateImpact.scope: Delivered ML-based parameter optimization platform with IDE integration (VS Code, IntelliJ)
corporateImpact.leadership: Executive sponsor for innovation initiative, secured funding and resources

corporateImpact.title: JCAA Platform - Automated Code Migration
corporateImpact.metric: Achieved General Availability with 95% automation rate for JDK upgrades
corporateImpact.impact: Reduced migration time from 6 weeks to 3 days per application, saving 2,000+ engineering hours
corporateImpact.scope: Product owner for enterprise code analysis platform supporting 1,000+ Java applications
corporateImpact.leadership: Led 30+ epics from conception to production release

corporateImpact.title: DFW Data Center Decommission
corporateImpact.metric: Successfully migrated 100+ VMs and decommissioned entire data center facility
corporateImpact.impact: $3M+ annual infrastructure cost savings, eliminated 500+ physical servers
corporateImpact.scope: Executive sponsor for multi-team migration affecting 50+ critical applications
corporateImpact.leadership: Coordinated across InfoSec, Platform Engineering, and application teams

corporateImpact.title: ReadyNow/Azul Platform Adoption
corporateImpact.metric: Onboarded 200+ applications to Azul Prime runtime with CNC optimization
corporateImpact.impact: 35% average performance improvement, 25% reduction in cloud compute costs ($5M+ annual savings)
corporateImpact.scope: Technical sponsor for vendor partnership and enterprise-wide adoption program
corporateImpact.leadership: Managed Azul partnership, policy enforcement, and application team enablement

corporateImpact.title: PCI Cloud Migration Program
corporateImpact.metric: Migrated 100% of payment applications from legacy CDC PCI to cloud infrastructure
corporateImpact.impact: Enhanced security compliance (PCI DSS), reduced infrastructure costs by 40%
corporateImpact.scope: Oversight for business-critical payment systems handling $500B+ annual transaction volume
corporateImpact.leadership: Coordinated security, compliance, and engineering teams across US and India

corporateImpact.title: SOX Compliance & Document Governance
corporateImpact.metric: Maintained 100% SOX audit compliance across 50+ controlled systems
corporateImpact.impact: Zero audit findings for 4 consecutive years, avoided potential penalties and operational disruptions
corporateImpact.scope: Managed CIS document governance for critical infrastructure and security controls
corporateImpact.leadership: Led quarterly certifications and annual compliance reviews

corporateImpact.title: Team Growth & Development
corporateImpact.metric: Grew team from 3 to 7 direct reports, promoted 2 engineers to senior/staff levels
corporateImpact.impact: Built high-performing platform engineering team with 95% retention rate
corporateImpact.scope: Hired 5 engineers, mentored 10+ across organization, led tech panel reviews
corporateImpact.leadership: Championed promotions, led hiring initiatives, created development programs
